testcase.classname: GET /tasks returns list of tasks with status 200
testcase.name: GET /tasks returns list of tasks with status 200

testcase.classname: POST /tasks creates a new task and returns 201
testcase.name: POST /tasks creates a new task and returns 201

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is empty
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is empty

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is missing
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is missing

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id updates a task and returns 200
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id updates a task and returns 200

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title is empty on update
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title is empty on update

testcase.classname: DELETE /tasks/:id deletes a task and returns 200
testcase.name: DELETE /tasks/:id deletes a task and returns 200
